allow: Bash(cat ~/.claude.json | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d.get\('mcpServers', {}\), indent=2\)\)")
Bash(curl -s http://localhost:6006/index.json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k\) for k in d.get\('entries', {}\).keys\(\)]" 2>/dev/null | head -50)

Bash(sleep 2 && curl -s http://localhost:6006/index.json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k\) for k in d.get\('entries',{}\).keys\(\) if 'recipesview' in k.lower\(\)]")

Bash(curl -s http://localhost:6006/index.json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in d['entries'].items\(\) if 'import' in k.lower\(\)}, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(curl -s http://localhost:6006/index.json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); keys=[k for k in data.get\('entries',{}\) if 'recipeimport' in k.lower\(\)]; print\('\\n'.join\(keys\)\)" 2>/dev/null || echo "Storybook not running")

Bash(curl -s http://localhost:6006/index.json | python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); entries=data.get\('entries',{}\); [print\(k, '->', v.get\('title',''\)\) for k,v in entries.items\(\) if any\(x in k.lower\(\) for x in ['step','count','stepper','number','quantity','spinner']\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k\) for k in d.get\(''''entries'''',{}\).keys\(\) if ''''sheet'''' in k.lower\(\) or ''''modal'''' in k.lower\(\) or ''''dialog'''' in k.lower\(\) or ''''bottom'''' in k.lower\(\)]")
